steps.title: Use half a sphere
steps.content:
A hemisphere has half the volume of a sphere.
$$
V=\frac{1}{2}(\frac{4}{3}\pi r^3)=\frac{2}{3}\pi r^3
$$

steps.title: Choose the closest value
steps.content: Approximate with $\pi$ near $3.14$. $$ 144{,}000(3.14)=452{,}160 $$ The closest listed value is $452{,}200$. The answer is D.
